# Proof-Governed Multi-Agent Institution v17

This addition adds a browser-local, data-zero demonstration of the coordination thesis:

> Large multi-agent systems coordinate to maximum effect when they become proof-governed sovereign institutions.

The implementation adds two public pages:

- `multi-agent-institution.html` — non-technical interactive institution lab.
- `coordination-engine.html` — advanced proof-conditioned coordination architecture.

The public demo runs entirely in the browser. It uses no forms, accounts, analytics, cookies, local storage, session storage, wallet connection, network request, token route, transaction broadcast, or production authority. Users are told not to enter personal, confidential, regulated, customer, wallet, seed phrase, or private-key data.

## User flow

```text
Choose public-safe mission
→ Run proof-governed institution
→ Watch ten gates advance
→ Inspect agent constellation and Chronicle trace
→ Download public-safe Evidence Docket JSON
→ Stop at human review
```

## Core architecture

```text
Objective
→ Mission Contract
→ Agent / Job Allocation
→ Tool Scope
→ Proof Bundle
→ Evidence Docket
→ Verifier Mesh
→ Governed Decision State
→ Settlement Decision
→ Chronicle
→ Capability Package
→ Harder Future Mission
```

## Coordination law

```text
Maximum coordination ≠ maximum autonomy.
Maximum coordination = maximum verified useful work per unit of risk, cost, latency, and proof debt.
```

## Work equation

```text
AI Work = Output × Proof × Validation × Settlement × Reuse
```

If proof is zero, trusted institutional work is zero.

## Implementation files

```text
site/multi-agent-institution.html
site/coordination-engine.html
site/assets/institution.css
site/assets/institution.js
data/multi-agent-coordination-law.json
schemas/multi-agent-coordination-law.schema.json
tools/multi-agent-institution-kernel.mjs
tests/multi-agent-institution.test.mjs
```

## Claim boundary

This is a browser-local demonstration and implementation scaffold. It is not an empirical maximum-performance claim, investment advice, legal advice, factual certification, external audit completion, Mainnet transaction record, production activation, or external validator attestation.
